verbGlossary.DEVELOPED DURING: {source} authored or substantially advanced within the named {target}
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED FOR: {source} package delivered to an authority as part of {target} approval process
verbGlossary.SUPPORTS: {source} or artifact provides ongoing reference value throughout {target}
verbGlossary.COORDINATES: {source} used to spatially align multiple trade scopes during {target}
verbGlossary.SEQUENCES: {source} assigns construction sequence and timing to work in {target}
verbGlossary.SIMULATES: {source} runs schedule simulation to rehearse execution of {target}
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIES: {source} extracts material quantities and cost data for {target}
verbGlossary.DELIVERED DURING: {source} artifact formally handed over as a deliverable of {target}
verbGlossary.REFERENCED DURING: {source} consulted as a baseline or source of truth during {target}
verbGlossary.HANDED OVER DURING: {source} transferred to the owner or operator as part of facility transition
verbGlossary.DETAILED FOR: {source} refined with additional geometry or data to satisfy {target} requirements
verbGlossary.EXTRACTED FOR: {source} geometry or data exported to drive fabrication or procurement
verbGlossary.PROGRESSES THROUGH: {source} level advances as the design matures through {target}
verbGlossary.REFINED DURING: {source} or element detail upgraded to meet submittal review requirements
verbGlossary.FINALIZED DURING: {source} or model element locked to as-built accuracy during closeout
verbGlossary.FEEDS: Takeoff or property data flows downstream into {target} workflow
verbGlossary.DRIVES: {source}directly triggers procurement or ordering actions in {target}
verbGlossary.VALIDATED DURING: {source} properties checked against installed equipment performance during commissioning
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED DURING: {source} properties compared to field-measured values during testing and balancing
verbGlossary.PRECEDES: {source} or coordination work completed before {target} begins in the field
verbGlossary.RESOLVES CONFLICTS BEFORE: {source} identifies and resolves spatial conflicts prior to {target}
verbGlossary.FLAGGED BEFORE: {source} raised and tracked ahead of {target} installation
verbGlossary.CONDUCTED DURING: {source} coordination meeting held within the timeframe of {target}
verbGlossary.SURVEYS: {source} or laser scan captures existing conditions for {target}
verbGlossary.VERIFIES PLACEMENT DURING: {source} confirms element positions match {target} during the target phase
verbGlossary.CAPTURES CONDITIONS FOR: {source}capture records as-built geometry for closeout documentation
verbGlossary.MONITORS: {source}provides ongoing visual or data monitoring of {target}
verbGlossary.INSPECTS: {source}capture used to visually inspect hard-to-reach work during {target}
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}capture creates a visual record of work performed in {target}
verbGlossary.PRODUCED FOR: {source}-based drawing generated to satisfy submittal or fabrication requirements of {target}
verbGlossary.VALIDATES: {source}confirms system performance meets design intent during {target}
verbGlossary.ENABLES: {source}provides the data foundation that makes {target} workflow possible
verbGlossary.TRACKS EFFICIENCY OF: {source}measures how quickly coordination issues are resolved during {target}
verbGlossary.SCORES: {source}rates the completeness of photo documentation for {target}
verbGlossary.EVALUATES: Metric assesses overall BIM coordination maturity during {target}
